banned: You have been banned from this bot. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact the bot owner.
bot_unavailable: This bot is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
captcha_blocked: Too many wrong answers. Try again in 1 hour.
captcha_blocked_toast: ❌ Too many wrong answers. Try again in 1 hour.
captcha_challenge_emoji: Please tap the {emoji} to confirm you are human:
captcha_challenge_math: What is {a} + {b}? Choose the correct answer:
cooldown_wait: {e_timer} Please wait {seconds}s before using this again.
form_closed: This form is no longer accepting responses.
form_closed_toast: ❌ This form is no longer accepting responses.
form_completed_body: Your response has been saved successfully.
form_no_questions: This form is not available right now.
form_no_questions_toast: ❌ This form is not available right now.
form_use_buttons_msg: Please use the buttons to answer.
join_passed: All channels verified! Type /start to continue.
join_required: To use this bot, please join {count} required channel(s):
referral_congrats: {e_party} Welcome! You joined through a personal invite link — the person who shared it with you has been notified. We're glad you're here!
referral_hint: Share this link! Every friend who joins through it is counted as your referral.
referral_not_enabled: Referral link sharing is not enabled for this bot.
sequence_already_enrolled: You are already enrolled in this.
sequence_no_steps: This content is not available yet.
sequence_not_enrolled: You are not enrolled in this.
sequence_unenrolled: You have been removed from this sequence.
start_first: Please send /start first to use this bot.
ticket_closed_toast:
✅️ Ticket #{number} closed

Your ticket has been resolved. Send a new message to open a fresh one.
ticket_opened: Ticket #{number} opened Your message has been forwarded to the support team. You will receive a reply here.
